zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Vernon於1212年出生在英國爾希布盧可時，她的父親Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook35歲，母親Auda Malbank38歲。她於大約1230年與Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1275年在英國爾達文哈姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Vernon于1212年出生在英国爾希布盧可时，她的父亲Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook35岁，母亲Auda Malbank38岁。她于大约1230年与Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1275年在英国爾達文哈姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Vernon was born in 1212, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, her father, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, was 35 and her mother, Auda Malbank, was 38. She married Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley about 1230, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1275, in Davenham, Cheshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Vernon est née en 1212, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Auda Malbank, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley environ 1230, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1275, à Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Vernon 1212 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook 35 und ihre Mutter Auda Malbank 38. Sie hat um 1230 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Davenham, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Vernon è nata il nel 1212 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Auda Malbank, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley circa 1230, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1275, nel Davenham, Cheshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Vernonが1212年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrookは35歳，母Auda Malbankは38歳であった。約1230年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1275年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Vernon(이)가 1212년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Auda Malbank(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 영국 체실르 대븐함에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Vernon nasceu em 1212, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Auda Malbank, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley aproximadamente 1230, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1275, em Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Vernon родилась в 1212 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Auda Malbank, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley около 1230 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1275 г. в местности давенам, чешир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.from 1252 to 1290: mai le 1252 e o'o I le 1290

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Vernon nació en 1212, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Auda Malbank, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley aproximadamente 1230, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1275, en Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
